module.name: hal_xsnor_base
module.details: Base class for SNOR flash devices.

config.name: XSNOR_BUFFER_SIZE
config.assert: XSNOR_BUFFER_SIZE must be a power of 2

configs.verbatim: /* Other consistency checks.*/ #if (XSNOR_USE_SPI == FALSE) && (XSNOR_USE_WSPI == FALSE) #error "XSNOR_USE_SPI or XSNOR_USE_WSPI must be enabled" #endif #if (XSNOR_USE_SPI == TRUE) && (HAL_USE_SPI == FALSE) #error "XSNOR_USE_SPI requires HAL_USE_SPI" #endif #if (XSNOR_USE_WSPI == TRUE) && (HAL_USE_WSPI == FALSE) #error "XSNOR_USE_WSPI requires HAL_USE_WSPI" #endif

define.name: XSNOR_USE_BOTH
define.brief: This switch is @p TRUE if both SPI and WSPI are in use.

group.description: Bus mutex macros when sharing is disabled

typedef.name: xsnor_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of a SNOR configuration structure.

typedef.name: xsnor_commands_t
typedef.brief: Type of a commands configuration structure.

field.name: drv
field.brief: WSPI driver to be used for physical communication.

field.name: drv
field.brief: SPI driver to be used for physical communication.

field.name: options
field.brief: Device-dependent options, used by subclasses only.

class.name: hal_xsnor_base
class.brief: Base class of all SNOR drivers.

field.name: commands
field.note: This field is meant to be initialized by subclasses on object creation.

method.name: xsnor_device_mmap_on
method.param: pointer to the memory mapped memory or @p NULL

method.name: __xsnor_spi_cmd_addr
method.brief: Sends command and address over SPI.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_acquire
__xsnor_bus_select
__xsnor_bus_release
__xsnor_bus_cmd
__xsnor_bus_cmd_send
method.brief: Sends a command followed by a data transmit phase.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_cmd_receive
method.brief: Sends a command followed by a data receive phase.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_cmd_addr
method.brief: Sends a command followed by a flash address.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_cmd_addr_send
method.brief: Sends a command followed by a flash address and a data transmit phase.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_cmd_addr_receive
method.brief: Sends a command followed by a flash address and a data receive phase.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_cmd_dummy_receive
method.brief: Sends a command followed by dummy cycles and a data receive phase.

method.name: __xsnor_bus_cmd_addr_dummy_receive
method.brief: Sends a complete header followed by a data receive phase.

method.name: xsnorMemoryMap
method.param: pointer to the memory mapped memory or @p NULL

method.name: xsnorMemoryUnmap

function.name: __xsnor_find_id
function.brief: Checks if an identifier is in a supported identifiers table.
function.param: Number of elements in the identifiers table.
function.retval: If the identifier is not present.
